title: solanum campylacanthum subsp. panduriforme
intro: Solanum campylacanthum subsp. panduriforme is a lesser-known subspecies of the Solanum campylacanthum plant, a type of flowering plant in the nightshade family, which is native to tropical Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves and roots, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Solanum campylacanthum subsp. panduriforme include treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing its leaves and roots in water, then using the resulting tea to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm the full extent of its medicinal properties.
